text.message: If red picks a position that's convenient for him, it works out for both of us
Let's all save a bunch of time
Nobody is ever gonna want sheep
Yeah realized when I offered lol
someone might wanna 4:1 you never know
Guess he wanted a sheep lol
I solo the next person to take one of those extortion deals
Nb for nb if you want
The only wheat I have is to use
I got a knight, you sure?
Good thing no one wants sheep because I've been robbed of 3 so far
I'll want sheep pretty soon dw
I'll revenge rob the next one
No matter if he's losing, can't play being robbed 4x in early ga.e
Hey red I can offer insurance for the 2:2
I can add a nb for the wheat
Y'all gonna be selling derivatives and sheep futures in two orbits
I'll keep the revenge rob situation
Or just skip the complex financial markets and go straight to emptying my pockets
May I have it back? What do you need to 4:1
We kinda want you to fight road
let it be known that I am NOT keeping road
I might never get a city down now lol
If you have the full route sure, i dont have wood now
What do you need to settle purple?
lol stop acting like ur trying to help them
if u want me to fight army red
